analysis_scope: pack-05-test-gap (complete test suite analysis for critical behaviors)

critical_behaviors.name: replay_resistance
critical_behaviors.description: Same transaction cannot execute twice (same message_id or same nonce)

critical_behaviors.name: partial_execution_failure
critical_behaviors.description: If one part of atomic transaction fails, entire transaction rolls back

critical_behaviors.name: rollback_guarantee
critical_behaviors.description: Failed transactions completely reverted, no partial state changes

critical_behaviors.name: finality_settlement
critical_behaviors.description: Blocks finalized by Grandpa cannot be reverted

evidence.detail: No testnet proof that finality holds

critical_behaviors.gap_description: Finality tested only in theory via Grandpa consensus. No multi-node testnet validation visible in evidence files.

critical_behaviors.name: bridge_timeout_handling
critical_behaviors.description: Expired transfers can be refunded without permanent lockup
critical_behaviors.gap_description: Expiry handling implemented but unbounded expiry allows locking for 8000+ years (see Audit 3 findings)

critical_behaviors.name: storage_overflow_protection
critical_behaviors.gap_description: Many storage limits configured, but critical gap: Transfers storage never pruned → unbounded state growth

critical_behaviors.name: boundary_amount_testing
critical_behaviors.description: Edge values (0, max_u128, max_balance) handled correctly
critical_behaviors.gap_description: Boundary testing partially implemented. No explicit test for zero-amount or max-value transfers.

critical_behaviors.name: invalid_input_rejection
critical_behaviors.description: Malformed inputs (wrong types, invalid addresses) rejected immediately

critical_behaviors.name: governance_gates
critical_behaviors.description: Unauthorized calls rejected (non-root cannot call admin functions)

critical_behaviors.name: validator_equivocation

evidence.detail: pallet-offences removed in Audit 1 as unwired

critical_behaviors.gap_description: CRITICAL GAP: Validator equivocation detection completely absent. No mechanism to detect or punish double-signing.

critical_behaviors.name: mempool_frontrun_protection
critical_behaviors.description: Transaction ordering is fair, no MEV/frontrunning
critical_behaviors.gap_description: Frontrunning prevention relies on framework. No explicit test showing MEV resistance in cross-VM scenarios.

critical_behaviors.name: safe_migration
critical_behaviors.description: Runtime upgrades don't lose data or cause forks

evidence.detail: Only migrations tuple for x3_kernel visible

critical_behaviors.gap_description: Migration implementation minimal. No multi-version upgrade test. No rollback test.

critical_behaviors.name: fresh_machine_bootstrap
critical_behaviors.description: New node starts from genesis and reaches consensus
critical_behaviors.gap_description: Genesis initialized but no test showing fresh node reaching consensus in multi-node network.

critical_behaviors.name: multi_node_launch
critical_behaviors.description: 3+ validators reach consensus, finalize blocks, handle Byzantine faults
critical_behaviors.gap_description: CRITICAL GAP: All 72 unit tests are single-node. Zero multi-node consensus tests visible. Testnet validation not completed.

critical_test_gaps_identified.description: No mechanism to detect or punish double-signing
critical_test_gaps_identified.impact: Validators can sign multiple blocks at same height → Byzantine safety broken
critical_test_gaps_identified.remediation: Implement staking pallet with equivocation detection OR implement signed statement tracking

critical_test_gaps_identified.description: All tests single-node. Zero multi-validator consensus tests.
critical_test_gaps_identified.impact: Cannot verify validators reach consensus. Network might not launch.
critical_test_gaps_identified.remediation: Deploy testnet with 3-5 validators, verify block finality, test Byzantine fault tolerance

critical_test_gaps_identified.description: Transfers storage never pruned → unbounded state growth
critical_test_gaps_identified.impact: State bloat over time leads to DOS via storage exhaustion
critical_test_gaps_identified.remediation: Implement on_initialize pruning of Finalized/Refunded/Failed transfers

critical_test_gaps_identified.description: Runtime migration implementation minimal, no upgrade tests
critical_test_gaps_identified.impact: Runtime upgrades could lose data or cause fork
critical_test_gaps_identified.remediation: Add multi-version upgrade test, downgrade test, state validation test

additional_gaps_requiring_attention.description: Finality theory verified but multi-node finality not tested
additional_gaps_requiring_attention.remediation: Testnet: submit block, wait for Grandpa finality, attempt revert

additional_gaps_requiring_attention.description: Expiry handling works but no upper bound test
No explicit test for zero-amount or max_u128 transfers
additional_gaps_requiring_attention.remediation: Add unit tests for edge cases: 0, 1, max_u128, max_balance

additional_gaps_requiring_attention.description: MEV resistance assumed by framework, no explicit test
additional_gaps_requiring_attention.remediation: Add test showing nonce prevents MEV in cross-VM scenarios

additional_gaps_requiring_attention.description: Single-node bootstrap tested, multi-node not tested
additional_gaps_requiring_attention.remediation: Testnet: fresh node joins 3-node network, reaches consensus

reasoning: Of 14 critical behaviors tested, only 4 pass without caveats. 6 have warnings (testnet validation pending, edge cases missing), and 4 are CRITICAL BLOCKERS: (1) Validator equivocation not implemented, (2) Multi-node consensus never tested (all 72 tests single-node), (3) Storage overflow - transfers never pruned, (4) Safe migration - upgrade safety not tested. Additional 5 high/medium-severity gaps identified. These must be resolved before mainnet launch.
required_before_mainnet: 2. Deploy testnet with 3+ validators and verify consensus
4. Add runtime migration and upgrade safety tests
6. Add boundary value tests (0, max_u128, etc)
8. Test fresh node bootstrap to consensus
